question: 统计近7天每日用户反馈数量及点赞率（点赞数/总反馈数），按日期升序排列
sql: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS 日期, COUNT(*) AS 反馈总数, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_thumb_up THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS 点赞率 FROM qa_feedback WHERE create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY 日期 ASC;
domain: _未分类_

question: 列出点赞数最多的前5个自然语言问题及其对应SQL，要求该问题未被纳入训练数据且提交时间在近30天内
sql: SELECT question AS 问题, sql AS 对应SQL FROM qa_feedback WHERE is_thumb_up = true AND is_in_training_data = false AND create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY id, question, sql ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5;
domain: _未分类_

question: 对比分析不同用户账号的反馈活跃度：统计每个user_id的总反馈数、已点赞数、未纳入训练数据的反馈数，并筛选出总反馈数超过2条的用户
sql: SELECT user_id AS 用户账号, COUNT(*) AS 总反馈数, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_thumb_up) AS 已点赞数, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_in_training_data) AS 未入训数 FROM qa_feedback GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY 总反馈数 DESC;
domain: _未分类_

question: 查询所有处于‘开放’状态的服务区名称、编码及所属公司ID，并按创建时间倒序排列
sql: SELECT service_area_name AS 服务区名称, service_area_no AS 服务区编码, company_id AS 所属公司ID FROM public.bss_service_area WHERE service_state = '开放' AND delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY create_ts DESC;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 统计每个路段名称下关联的服务区数量，并仅显示服务区数量大于1的路段
sql: SELECT s.section_name AS 路段名称, COUNT(l.service_area_id) AS 关联服务区数量 FROM public.bss_section_route s JOIN public.bss_section_route_area_link l ON s.id = l.section_route_id GROUP BY s.section_name HAVING COUNT(l.service_area_id) > 1;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 列出所有未被逻辑删除的服务区及其所在路线名称，要求按路线名称升序、服务区名称降序排列
sql: SELECT a.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, r.route_name AS 所属路线名称 FROM public.bss_service_area a JOIN public.bss_section_route_area_link l ON a.id = l.service_area_id JOIN public.bss_section_route r ON l.section_route_id = r.id WHERE a.delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY r.route_name ASC, a.service_area_name DESC;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 查询信息化服务区中经纬度坐标包含‘28.’的所有服务区名称、类型和坐标位置
sql: SELECT service_area_name AS 服务区名称, service_area_type AS 服务区类型, service_position AS 经纬度坐标 FROM public.bss_service_area WHERE service_area_type = '信息化服务区' AND service_position LIKE '%28.%' AND delete_ts IS NULL;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 找出每个公司的服务区内数量TOP3的公司名称（需关联公司表，此处用company_id模拟），并标注其服务区总数
sql: SELECT company_id AS 公司ID, COUNT(*) AS 服务区总数 FROM public.bss_service_area WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ORDER BY 服务区总数 DESC LIMIT 3;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 对比分析昌栗路段与昌韶路段各自覆盖的服务区数量及平均创建时间（以天为单位，从2020-01-01起算）
sql: SELECT r.route_name AS 路线名称, COUNT(a.id) AS 服务区数量, FLOOR(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a.create_ts - '2020-01-01'::timestamp)) / 86400)) AS 平均创建天数 FROM public.bss_section_route r JOIN public.bss_section_route_area_link l ON r.id = l.section_route_id JOIN public.bss_service_area a ON l.service_area_id = a.id WHERE r.route_name IN ('昌栗', '昌韶') AND a.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY r.route_name;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 查询尚未关联任何路段的服务区名称、编码及状态
sql: SELECT service_area_name AS 服务区名称, service_area_no AS 服务区编码, service_state AS 服务区状态 FROM public.bss_service_area a WHERE a.delete_ts IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.bss_section_route_area_link l WHERE l.service_area_id = a.id);
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 按服务区类型分组，统计各类型下处于‘开放’状态且已更新过至少一次的服务区数量及最新更新时间
sql: SELECT service_area_type AS 服务区类型, COUNT(*) AS 开放服务区数量, MAX(update_ts) AS 最新更新时间 FROM public.bss_service_area WHERE service_state = '开放' AND update_ts IS NOT NULL AND delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY service_area_type ORDER BY 开放服务区数量 DESC;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 获取每条路线所覆盖的唯一服务区数量、最早和最晚创建的服务区名称
sql: SELECT r.route_name AS 路线名称, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS 覆盖服务区数, MIN(a.service_area_name) AS 最早创建服务区名称, MAX(a.service_area_name) AS 最晚创建服务区名称 FROM public.bss_section_route r JOIN public.bss_section_route_area_link l ON r.id = l.section_route_id JOIN public.bss_service_area a ON l.service_area_id = a.id WHERE a.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY r.route_name ORDER BY 覆盖服务区数 DESC;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 查询在2021年7月之后创建或更新过的所有服务区信息，包括名称、编码、类型、状态及最近操作时间（取create_ts和update_ts中较晚者）
sql: SELECT service_area_name AS 服务区名称, service_area_no AS 服务区编码, service_area_type AS 服务区类型, service_state AS 服务区状态, GREATEST(create_ts, COALESCE(update_ts, create_ts)) AS 最近操作时间 FROM public.bss_service_area WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND GREATEST(create_ts, COALESCE(update_ts, create_ts)) > '2021-07-01'::timestamp;
domain: 服务区基础资产与地理拓扑

question: 查询所有未被逻辑删除的公司名称及其编码，并按创建时间倒序排列
sql: SELECT company_name AS 公司名称, company_no AS 公司编码, create_ts AS 创建时间 FROM public.bss_company WHERE delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY create_ts DESC;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 统计每个公司的下属经营网点数量，并只显示网点数大于2的公司
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, COUNT(b.id) AS 网点数量 FROM public.bss_company c JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.company_name HAVING COUNT(b.id) > 2 ORDER BY 网点数量 DESC;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 列出所有餐饮类别的经营网点名称、所属公司名称及方向信息，按公司名称和方向排序
sql: SELECT b.branch_name AS 档口名称, c.company_name AS 所属公司, b.direction AS 方向 FROM public.bss_branch b JOIN public.bss_company c ON b.company_id = c.id WHERE b.classify = '餐饮' AND b.delete_ts IS NULL AND c.delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY c.company_name, b.direction;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 查询上饶分公司和宜春分公司各自拥有的经营网点总数及平均创建时间
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, COUNT(b.id) AS 网点总数, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM b.create_ts)) AS 平均创建时间戳秒数 FROM public.bss_company c LEFT JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.company_name IN ('上饶分公司', '宜春分公司') AND c.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.company_name;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 查询每个公司名下不同品牌（product_brand）的经营网点数量，并按公司名和品牌分组排序
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, b.product_brand AS 品牌, COUNT(*) AS 网点数量 FROM public.bss_company c JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.company_name, b.product_brand ORDER BY c.company_name, 网点数量 DESC;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 对比各公司经营网点中‘手工录入’与‘系统自动’的数据比例（以百分比表示）
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN b.is_manual_entry = 1 THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS 手工录入占比, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN b.is_manual_entry = 0 THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS 系统自动占比 FROM public.bss_company c JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.company_name;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 查询合作单位为‘江西驿美餐饮管理有限责任公司’的所有档口名称、所属服务区ID及方向
sql: SELECT branch_name AS 档口名称, service_area_id AS 服务区ID, direction AS 方向 FROM public.bss_branch WHERE co_company = '江西驿美餐饮管理有限责任公司' AND delete_ts IS NULL;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 获取每个公司最近一次更新其下属网点的时间（取最大update_ts），并关联公司名称和编码
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, c.company_no AS 公司编码, MAX(b.update_ts) AS 最近网点更新时间 FROM public.bss_company c JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.company_name, c.company_no ORDER BY 最近网点更新时间 DESC;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 列出所有存在多个同名档口（branch_name）的公司名称及其重复档口数量
sql: SELECT c.company_name AS 公司名称, b.branch_name AS 档口名称, COUNT(*) AS 重复次数 FROM public.bss_company c JOIN public.bss_branch b ON c.id = b.company_id WHERE c.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY c.company_name, b.branch_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY 重复次数 DESC;
domain: 经营主体与组织架构

question: 查询2023年4月1日各服务区微信支付金额排名前5的档口名称及对应金额
sql: SELECT branch_name AS 档口名称, wx AS 微信支付金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = '2023-04-01' AND wx IS NOT NULL ORDER BY wx DESC LIMIT 5;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 统计2023年4月全月各服务区总支付金额（pay_sum）及订单总数（order_sum），按金额降序排列
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, SUM(pay_sum) AS 总支付金额, SUM(order_sum) AS 总订单数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY 总支付金额 DESC;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 对比分析2023年4月1日与4月2日庐山服务区的现金支付金额（rmb）和订单数（rmb_order）变化情况
sql: SELECT oper_date AS 统计日期, rmb AS 现金支付金额, rmb_order AS 现金订单数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name = '庐山服务区' AND oper_date IN ('2023-04-01', '2023-04-02') ORDER BY oper_date;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 查询2023年4月1日微信支付金额超过5000元且支付宝订单数大于10的所有档口明细，包含服务区名称、档口名称、微信金额、支付宝订单数
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, branch_name AS 档口名称, wx AS 微信支付金额, zf_order AS 支付宝订单数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = '2023-04-01' AND wx > 5000.0 AND zf_order > 10;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 统计2023年4月各支付渠道（微信、支付宝、现金、信用卡、京东）在全网的总交易金额，并按金额从高到低排序
sql: SELECT '微信' AS 支付渠道, SUM(wx) AS 总金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' UNION ALL SELECT '支付宝' AS 支付渠道, SUM(zfb) AS 总金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' UNION ALL SELECT '现金' AS 支付渠道, SUM(rmb) AS 总金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' UNION ALL SELECT '信用卡' AS 支付渠道, SUM(xs) AS 总金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' UNION ALL SELECT '京东' AS 支付渠道, SUM(jd) AS 总金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' ORDER BY 总金额 DESC;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 查询2022年3月2日各车型（car_type）在所有服务区的车辆总数（customer_count），仅显示总数超200的车型
sql: SELECT car_type AS 车型, SUM(customer_count) AS 车辆总数 FROM public.bss_car_day_count WHERE count_date = '2022-03-02' GROUP BY car_type HAVING SUM(customer_count) > 200;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 联合分析2023年4月1日宜春服务区档口经营数据与当日该服务区各车型车流数据（需关联服务区编码映射），展示档口名称、微信金额、车型、车辆数
sql: SELECT b.branch_name AS 档口名称, b.wx AS 微信金额, c.car_type AS 车型, c.customer_count AS 车辆数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data b LEFT JOIN public.bss_car_day_count c ON b.service_no = c.service_area_id WHERE b.oper_date = '2023-04-01' AND b.service_name = '宜春服务区' AND c.count_date = '2023-04-01';
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 计算2023年4月每日全网总支付金额（pay_sum）与总车流数（customer_count）的比值（即单辆车平均消费金额），要求按日期升序排列
sql: SELECT d.oper_date AS 日期, COALESCE(SUM(d.pay_sum), 0) / NULLIF(SUM(c.customer_count), 0) AS 单车平均消费金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data d LEFT JOIN public.bss_car_day_count c ON d.service_no = c.service_area_id AND d.oper_date = c.count_date WHERE d.oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND d.oper_date <= '2023-04-30' GROUP BY d.oper_date ORDER BY 日期 ASC;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 找出2023年4月订单总数（order_sum）日均值最高的前3个服务区，并返回其名称及日均订单数
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, AVG(order_sum) AS 日均订单数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY 日均订单数 DESC LIMIT 3;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 查询2023年4月存在至少一天微信支付金额为0但支付宝支付金额大于0的服务区名称列表
sql: SELECT DISTINCT service_name AS 服务区名称 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' AND wx = 0.0 AND zfb > 0.0;
domain: 日度经营与客流分析

question: 查询所有主题中属于‘交易分析’分类标签的元数据记录，并按更新时间倒序排列，仅显示主题编码、主题名称和更新时间
sql: SELECT topic_code AS 主题编码, topic_name AS 主题名称, update_ts AS 更新时间 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE theme_tag = '交易分析' ORDER BY update_ts DESC;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 统计每个主题分类标签（theme_tag）下关联的表数量总和，并只保留关联表数大于2的主题分类
sql: SELECT theme_tag AS 分类标签, SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(related_tables, 1)) AS 关联表总数 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE related_tables IS NOT NULL GROUP BY theme_tag HAVING SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(related_tables, 1)) > 2;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 列出关键词包含‘车流’或‘车型’的所有主题元数据，返回主题名称、描述及关键词数组，并按主题名称升序排序
sql: SELECT topic_name AS 主题名称, description AS 描述, keywords AS 关键词 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE '车流' = ANY(keywords) OR '车型' = ANY(keywords) ORDER BY topic_name ASC;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 查找最近7天内更新的元数据记录中，问题字段（questions）非空且至少包含2个常见问题的主题，显示主题名称、问题数量和更新时间
sql: SELECT topic_name AS 主题名称, JSONB_ARRAY_LENGTH(questions) AS 问题数量, update_ts AS 更新时间 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE update_ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND questions IS NOT NULL AND JSONB_ARRAY_LENGTH(questions) >= 2;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 获取所有主题中关联表名包含‘traffic’或‘transaction’的元数据，去重后按主题编码升序返回主题编码、主题名称和关联表数组
sql: SELECT DISTINCT topic_code AS 主题编码, topic_name AS 主题名称, related_tables AS 关联表 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE related_tables @> ARRAY['traffic_daily'] OR related_tables @> ARRAY['transaction_daily'] OR 'traffic_hourly' = ANY(related_tables) OR 'transaction_summary' = ANY(related_tables) ORDER BY topic_code ASC;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 对比‘日营收’和‘车流量’两个主题的关键词重合度：列出它们共有的关键词，并统计出现频次
sql: SELECT keyword AS "共有关键词", COUNT(*) AS "出现频次" FROM (SELECT UNNEST(k1.keywords) AS keyword FROM public.highway_metadata k1 WHERE k1.topic_code = 'daily_revenue') AS t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT UNNEST(k2.keywords) AS keyword FROM public.highway_metadata k2 WHERE k2.topic_code = 'traffic_volume') AS t2 USING (keyword) GROUP BY keyword;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 查询每个主题名称下最常见的关键词（即在该主题keywords数组中出现次数最多的单个词），仅返回主题名称和最高频关键词
sql: SELECT topic_name AS 主题名称, (SELECT UNNEST(keywords) AS kw GROUP BY kw ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS 最高频关键词 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE keywords IS NOT NULL AND ARRAY_LENGTH(keywords, 1) > 0;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 找出描述字段中包含‘同比’或‘环比’字样的主题元数据，返回主题编码、主题名称、描述摘要（前100字符）和更新时间
sql: SELECT topic_code AS 主题编码, topic_name AS 主题名称, SUBSTRING(description FROM 1 FOR 100) AS 描述摘要, update_ts AS 更新时间 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE description ~* '同比|环比';
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 按主题分类标签分组，统计各组下元数据记录数、平均关联表数量以及含问题字段的比例（问题字段非空则计1），结果按记录数降序排列
sql: SELECT theme_tag AS 分类标签, COUNT(*) AS 记录数, ROUND(AVG(ARRAY_LENGTH(related_tables, 1)), 2) AS 平均关联表数, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN questions IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DECIMAL / COUNT(*), 4) AS 含问题比例 FROM public.highway_metadata GROUP BY theme_tag ORDER BY 记录数 DESC;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 查询所有主题中关联了超过3张源表且关键词包含‘智能’的主题，返回主题名称、关联表数量、关键词列表，并按关联表数量降序排列
sql: SELECT topic_name AS 主题名称, ARRAY_LENGTH(related_tables, 1) AS 关联表数量, keywords AS 关键词列表 FROM public.highway_metadata WHERE ARRAY_LENGTH(related_tables, 1) > 3 AND '智能' = ANY(keywords) ORDER BY 关联表数量 DESC;
domain: 数据治理与元信息管理

question: 查询所有未被逻辑删除的服务区映射记录，按创建时间倒序排列，显示服务区名称、编码、来源系统类型和创建人
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, service_no AS 服务区编码, source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, created_by AS 创建人 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY create_ts DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 统计各来源系统类型（source_system_type）下映射的服务区数量，并按数量降序排列
sql: SELECT source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, COUNT(*) AS 映射服务区数量 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY source_system_type ORDER BY 映射服务区数量 DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 找出被多个不同来源系统类型映射的同一服务区（service_area_id），列出该服务区ID、名称及关联的系统类型列表
sql: SELECT service_area_id AS 服务区唯一ID, MAX(service_name) AS 服务区名称, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT source_system_type, ', ') AS 关联来源系统类型 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY service_area_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT source_system_type) > 1;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 查询最新更新时间在2023年之后的所有映射记录，仅返回服务区名称、编码、来源系统类型及最后更新时间
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, service_no AS 服务区编码, source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, update_ts AS 最后更新时间 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND update_ts > '2023-01-01' ORDER BY update_ts DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 对比‘驿美’和‘驿购’两个来源系统的映射记录数，输出系统类型名称及对应记录数
sql: SELECT source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, COUNT(*) AS 记录数 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND source_system_type IN ('驿美', '驿购') GROUP BY source_system_type;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 获取创建人是‘admin’且未被删除的映射记录中，按来源系统类型分组的服务区平均版本号（version）
sql: SELECT source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, ROUND(AVG(version), 2) AS 平均版本号 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND created_by = 'admin' GROUP BY source_system_type;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 列出最近7天内新增的映射记录（按create_ts判断），显示服务区名称、编码、来源系统类型、创建时间和创建人
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, service_no AS 服务区编码, source_system_type AS 来源系统类型, create_ts AS 创建时间, created_by AS 创建人 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND create_ts >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY create_ts DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 查询所有存在逻辑删除记录（delete_ts非空）的服务区映射信息，包括服务区名称、编码、删除时间、删除人，并按删除时间倒序排列
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, service_no AS 服务区编码, delete_ts AS 删除时间, deleted_by AS 删除人 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NOT NULL ORDER BY delete_ts DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射

question: 统计每种数据来源类别ID（source_type）下有效映射记录数，并筛选出记录数超过5条的类别，按数量降序输出类别ID和记录数
sql: SELECT source_type AS 来源类别ID, COUNT(*) AS 有效映射记录数 FROM public.bss_service_area_mapper WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY source_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY 有效映射记录数 DESC;
domain: 跨系统服务对象主数据映射
